summary: Iteration 4 testing completed. Backend: 42/42 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features verified - Google Sign-In button present, Google profile completion screen exists, WebSocket chat screen functional, FCM token registration endpoint working. All iteration 4 requirements met.

react_native_issues.issue: React Native warning: 'Unexpected text node: . A text node cannot be a child of a <View>'. This warning persists from iteration 1. Non-critical but should be addressed.
react_native_issues.recommendation: Review all components that use bullet points or mix icons with text. Ensure all text including special characters are wrapped in <Text> components.

Public URL: https://bride-connect-3.preview.emergentagent.com

iteration_4_specific_findings.google_auth_implementation: Google Sign-In uses expo-auth-session library (not @react-native-google-signin/google-signin) which works on both web preview and native builds. Uses useAuthRequest hook with Google OAuth discovery endpoints. On successful auth, decodes JWT id_token to extract email, name, and photoUrl. Backend creates user with auth_provider='google' and empty gender field. If gender is empty, frontend redirects to /google-complete screen for profile completion.
iteration_4_specific_findings.google_complete_flow: First-time Google users (gender='') are redirected to /google-complete screen after login. Screen prompts for full name and gender selection (Male/Female buttons with icons). On submit, calls POST /api/auth/google-complete-profile which updates user.name and user.gender. After completion, user is redirected to /(tabs)/home.
iteration_4_specific_findings.websocket_chat_implementation: Chat screen connects to WebSocket at /ws/chat/{token} where token is JWT auth token. Backend authenticates WebSocket connection by decoding JWT. WebSocket accepts JSON messages with action field: 'send_message' (receiverId, content), 'mark_read' (partnerId), 'typing' (receiverId). Backend stores messages in messages collection and broadcasts to both sender and receiver via WebSocket. Frontend falls back to REST API (POST /api/chat/send) if WebSocket is not connected.
iteration_4_specific_findings.fcm_token_registration: Backend endpoint POST /api/notifications/register-token accepts {token: string} and saves to user.fcmToken field with fcmTokenUpdatedAt timestamp. This prepares infrastructure for push notifications (FCM integration not yet implemented in frontend).
iteration_4_specific_findings.chat_plan_gating: Chat features (send message, get messages) require Focus or Commit plan. Free users receive 403 error with message 'Chat requires Focus or Commit plan'. Additionally, chat requires active mutual connection (checked via connections_data collection with status='active' and expiresAt > now).
iteration_4_specific_findings.expo_auth_session_config: Google OAuth configured with WEB_CLIENT_ID, redirectUri using AuthSession.makeRedirectUri({preferLocalhost: false}), responseType='id_token', scopes=['openid', 'email', 'profile'], and random nonce for security. Uses WebBrowser.maybeCompleteAuthSession() to handle auth callback.

websocket_endpoint_verification.authentication: JWT token in URL path, decoded to get user_id
websocket_endpoint_verification.connection_manager: ConnectionManager class maintains active WebSocket connections in dictionary {user_id: websocket}
message_actions: send_message: Creates message in DB, broadcasts to sender and receiver
mark_read: Updates messages.read=True for partner's messages
typing: Sends typing indicator to receiver
websocket_endpoint_verification.error_handling: WebSocketDisconnect removes user from active connections, JWTError closes connection with code 4001

rca_of_issue: No critical issues found in iteration 4. React Native text node warning persists from iteration 1 (non-critical). Root cause: text nodes appearing as direct children of <View> components instead of being wrapped in <Text> components. Likely locations: match detail rows using icons + text, subscription feature lists with checkmarks/crosses. Mitigation: Wrap all text content including special characters in <Text> components.
